text: waivers provided hereunder shall be effective as to any individual or entity, even if such  individual  or  entity  (a)  would  otherwise  have  a  duty  of  indemnification, contractual  or  otherwise,  (b)  did  not  pay  the  insurance  premium,  directly  or indirectly, and (c) whether or not such individual or entity has an insurable interest in the property damaged.
